title: Flow of Continuous Internal Evaluation in a Distributed System
description: This flowchart illustrates the cyclical process of monitoring, analyzing, and adapting system components to maintain health and performance autonomously.
relationships: Monitoring Agents collect metrics from Components and send them to the Analyzer
The Analyzer processes the data, detects issues or opportunities for optimization, and sends commands to the Adaptation Module
The Adaptation Module applies changes (e.g., scaling, reconfiguring) back to the System Components, completing the feedback loop
